sections.paragraph:
- Original: ταύτῃταύτηνταύτης

- Transliteration: Taute

- Phonetic: tow'-tay

- Definition:

1. this, that, the same, see 3778

- Origin: dative case, accusative case and genitive case respectively of the feminine singular of G3778

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: Dative accusative and genitive case respectively of the feminine singular of G3778; (towards or of) this: - her + hereof it that + thereby the (same) this (same).
